sent_simp: 秦始皇统一六国后在咸阳建都。
sent_trad: 秦始皇統一六國後在咸陽建都。
pinyin: Qín Shǐhuáng tǒngyī liù guó hòu zài Xiányáng jiàndū.
english: After the First Emperor of Qin unified the six kingdoms, he established his capital at Xianyang.

sent_simp: 她买了一辆微型车，停车方便多了。
sent_trad: 她買了一輛微型車，停車方便多了。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī liàng wēixíng chē, tíngchē fāngbiàn duō le.
english: She bought a mini car, which makes parking much more convenient.
